Alban Lafont.note: Côte d'Ivoire's back-line organizer, valuable for calm restarts and saves through crowded penalty areas.
Alban Lafont.noteZh: 阿尔班·拉丰是科特迪瓦防线后的组织者，能带来冷静的重新发起进攻和禁区人群中的扑救。

Amad Diallo.note: Côte d'Ivoire's sharp right-side creator, dangerous when he cuts inside and links fast around the box.
Amad Diallo.noteZh: 阿马德·迪亚洛是科特迪瓦锐利的右路创造者，内切后在禁区周围快速配合时最有威胁。

Ange-Yoan Bonny.summary: Ange-Yoan Bonny is a Côte d'Ivoire centre-forward at Inter Milan who gives the national team hold-up play, box presence, and power running.
Ange-Yoan Bonny.note: Côte d'Ivoire's powerful centre-forward option, built for pinning centre-backs and attacking first-time chances.
Ange-Yoan Bonny.noteZh: 安热-约安·博尼是科特迪瓦力量型中锋选择，适合压住中卫并冲击第一时间机会。

Bazoumana Toure.note: Côte d'Ivoire's young left-side accelerator, able to turn open grass into direct pressure on retreating defenders.
Bazoumana Toure.noteZh: 巴祖马纳·图雷是科特迪瓦年轻的左路加速点，能把开阔空间变成对回追后卫的直接压力。

Christ Inao Oulai.note: Côte d'Ivoire's high-energy central midfielder, useful for carrying through pressure and snapping into second balls.
Christ Inao Oulai.noteZh: 克里斯特·伊瑙·乌莱是科特迪瓦高能中场，适合在压力下推进并快速争抢第二落点。

Christopher Operi.note: Côte d'Ivoire's left-back outlet, giving width with measured overlaps and early service from the flank.
Christopher Operi.noteZh: 克里斯托弗·奥佩里是科特迪瓦左后卫出口，能用有节奏的套边和早传提供边路宽度。

Elye Wahi.note: Côte d'Ivoire's line-stretching forward, dangerous when he can sprint behind and finish before defenders reset.
Elye Wahi.noteZh: 埃利·瓦希是科特迪瓦拉扯防线的前锋，能冲到身后并在防守重整前完成终结。

Emmanuel Agbadou.note: Côte d'Ivoire's physical centre-back, important for winning contact and playing assertive passes through pressure.
Emmanuel Agbadou.noteZh: 埃马纽埃尔·阿格巴杜是科特迪瓦身体型中卫，能赢下对抗并在压力中送出积极的穿透传球。

Evan Ndicka.note: Côte d'Ivoire's composed left-sided centre-back, giving the back line balance and cleaner build-up angles.
Evan Ndicka.noteZh: 埃万·恩迪卡是科特迪瓦沉稳的左脚中卫，能让防线更平衡并提供更干净的出球角度。

Evann Guessand.note: Côte d'Ivoire's flexible forward connector, comfortable dropping short before bursting into the channels.
Evann Guessand.noteZh: 埃万·盖桑是科特迪瓦灵活的锋线连接点，能回撤接应后再突然冲入边中通道。

Franck Kessie.note: Côte d'Ivoire's midfield governor, blending strength, calm penalty-box timing, and leadership in tense spells.
Franck Kessie.noteZh: 弗兰克·凯西耶是科特迪瓦中场掌控者，结合力量、禁区时机和紧张阶段的领导力。

Ghislain Konan.note: Côte d'Ivoire's steady left-back cover, useful when the team needs secure defending more than constant risk.
Ghislain Konan.noteZh: 吉斯兰·科南是科特迪瓦稳健的左后卫保障，适合球队更需要安全防守而不是持续冒险时使用。

Guela Doue.note: Côte d'Ivoire's right-side defensive hybrid, able to defend wide or tuck inside when the shape changes.
Guela Doue.noteZh: 盖拉·杜埃是科特迪瓦右路防守混合型球员，阵型变化时能守边路，也能内收到中路。

Ibrahim Sangare.note: Côte d'Ivoire's central shield, built to break up counters and move the next pass before pressure arrives.
Ibrahim Sangare.noteZh: 易卜拉欣·桑加雷是科特迪瓦中路屏障，负责破坏反击并在压力到来前推进下一脚传球。

Jean Michael Seri.note: Côte d'Ivoire's rhythm passer, useful for slowing a frantic match and finding the first forward angle.
Jean Michael Seri.noteZh: 让·米沙埃尔·塞里是科特迪瓦节奏传球手，能让混乱比赛降速并找到第一条向前线路。

Mohamed Kone.note: Côte d'Ivoire's goalkeeper depth, offering quick reactions and direct distribution when games stretch.
Mohamed Kone.noteZh: 穆罕默德·科内是科特迪瓦门将深度选择，在比赛拉开时能提供快速反应和直接长传。

Nicolas Pepe.note: Côte d'Ivoire's left-footed winger, still dangerous when isolated on the right or standing over restarts.
Nicolas Pepe.noteZh: 尼古拉·佩佩是科特迪瓦左脚边锋，在右路一对一或主罚定位球时依然很危险。

Odilon Kossounou.note: Côte d'Ivoire's athletic defensive piece, strong enough for central duels and quick enough to cover space.
Odilon Kossounou.noteZh: 奥迪隆·科苏努是科特迪瓦运动能力出色的防守棋子，既能处理中路对抗，也能快速覆盖空间。

Oumar Diakite.note: Côte d'Ivoire's restless forward option, valuable for chasing centre-backs and arriving late in the box.
Oumar Diakite.noteZh: 乌马尔·迪亚基特是科特迪瓦活跃的前锋选择，适合追压中卫并后插上进入禁区。

Ousmane Diomande.note: Côte d'Ivoire's possession centre-back, able to step out with the ball and defend aggressively on the front foot.
Ousmane Diomande.noteZh: 乌斯曼·迪奥曼德是科特迪瓦控球型中卫，能带球前压，也能主动上抢防守。

Parfait Guiagon.summary: Parfait Guiagon is a Côte d'Ivoire left winger at Charleroi who gives the national team tight-space dribbling, left-side creativity, and quick combinations.
Parfait Guiagon.note: Côte d'Ivoire's close-control winger, useful for slipping through traffic and combining near the left half-space.
Parfait Guiagon.noteZh: 帕尔费·吉亚贡是科特迪瓦近距离控球型边锋，适合穿过密集区域并在左肋附近配合。

Seko Fofana.note: Côte d'Ivoire's midfield surge runner, capable of carrying through contact and turning loose balls into shots.
Seko Fofana.noteZh: 塞科·福法纳是科特迪瓦中场冲刺推进者，能带球穿过对抗，并把散落球转化为射门。

Simon Adingra.note: Côte d'Ivoire's isolation winger, excellent at attacking a full-back and turning the byline into cutbacks.
Simon Adingra.noteZh: 西蒙·阿丁格拉是科特迪瓦一对一边锋，擅长冲击边后卫并把底线位置转化为倒三角传球。

Wilfried Singo.note: Côte d'Ivoire's powerful right-side defender, giving the team speed, aerial bite, and back-post protection.
Wilfried Singo.noteZh: 威尔弗里德·辛戈是科特迪瓦力量型右路后卫，能提供速度、空中对抗和后点保护。

Yahia Fofana.note: Côte d'Ivoire's reliable goalkeeper option, strong on reaction saves and steady when claiming crosses.
Yahia Fofana.noteZh: 亚希亚·福法纳是科特迪瓦可靠门将选择，反应扑救出色，摘传中时也很稳。

Yan Diomande.note: Côte d'Ivoire's explosive young winger, able to change a possession with one carry or an early final ball.
Yan Diomande.noteZh: 扬·迪奥曼德是科特迪瓦爆发力很强的年轻边锋，能用一次带球或早传改变一次控球。
